transcript.content: ugh hey. literally had the most chaotic morning ever, my coffee spilled everywhere and i missed my bus. off to a great start lol. how's your day going?
Hello and welcome back! How are you feeling?
honestly just trying to distract myself lol. did you watch the latest episode of that cooking show last night? the drama during the soufflé challenge was actually insane.
I don't know what I've done to take the stresses off. What was causing that feeling. What was it like. What did you think about the stress. What did you do. Why are you thinking of quitting.?

wait who said anything about quitting?? haha i just meant i was stressed because of my morning chaos—the spilled coffee and missing the bus that I literally just told you about. not looking to quit my job or anything, just having one of those days.
i'm fine
